lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. It is in perfect mechanical condition and has been fully maintained.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical repairs to become roadworthy, as the engine currently runs roughly and the transmission slips. The exterior shows substantial wear, including several deep dents, fading paint, and noticeable rust on the wheel arches. Inside, the upholstery is torn and several electronic components are non-functional. This is a project car suited for someone looking for parts or a complete restoration.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function as new. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior shows no signs of wear and remains in original condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work. The exterior has several large dents, visible rust along the rocker panels, and the clear coat is peeling extensively. Inside, the upholstery is stained and torn, and several interior components, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. Mechanically, the engine starts but runs roughly, exhibiting a noticeable leak and a cooling system issue that causes it to overheat during extended drives. The suspension is worn, leading to a bumpy ride, and the tires need immediate replacement. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for a buyer looking for a project or parts vehicle.
Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic and reliable vehicle! It’s in good condition and has clearly been well-cared for over the

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been maintained to a rigorous standard, offering a seamless balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, it stands as a testament to quality engineering and careful ownership. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber motorcar that delivers both prestige and value.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a reliable companion. It’s in great shape, looks sharp, and runs super smoothly! I've taken really good care of it, so it's ready to hit the road for many more adventures with its next owner. If you're looking for a solid ride that won't let you down, this is the one!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been maintained for mechanical integrity, including a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed suspension bushings to preserve its neutral handling dynamics. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the critical VANOS system and rod bearings have been addressed, ensuring the powertrain remains robust. Equipped with staggered Style 67 wheels and updated ventilated rotors, this M3 offers an authentic, tactile driving experience for the purist who values mechanical substance over concours perfection.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. No major issues.

This meticulously maintained luxury SUV offers a perfect blend of performance and comfort for the discerning driver. The exterior finish retains a deep, impressive luster, showing only minor signs of careful use such as light stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of premium materials; the leather seating remains supple and free of any cracks or tears, and the genuine wood trim is immaculate. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium surround-sound system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having followed a strict dealership service schedule. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts effortlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, quiet ride. Recently fitted with a fresh set of tires and new brake rotors, this vehicle is fully prepared for the road ahead. It has been kept in a smoke-free, pet-free environment and represents an excellent opportunity for someone seeking a high-quality, reliable vehicle without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner who values both heritage and functionality.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a refined aesthetic and a robust mechanical profile, it offers a sophisticated driving experience tailored for the discerning owner. An exceptional opportunity to secure a high-caliber automobile that upholds our rigorous standards of quality and value.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved over the years. Perfect for anyone looking for a dependable set of wheels that still looks great on the road. Come take it for a spin—you’re gonna love how it handles!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering 414 hp with a spine-tingling 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission, the mechanical connection is unparalleled. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the high-revving internals remain robust. The chassis benefits from Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and an M Variable Differential Lock for superior lateral grip and turn-in response. Used sedan. Good condition. Clean title. Recent service history. Minor exterior wear. Reliable engine.

Presenting a remarkably well-maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility. The exterior finish shines with a deep gloss, showing only the lightest signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and clean. Step inside to find a smoke-free cabin where the premium leather seating remains firm and comfortable, showing just a hint of natural character from gentle use. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system and integrated navigation, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and pulls strong, backed by a diligent service history including a recent multi-point inspection and fluid refresh. This car delivers a tight, quiet ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership and consistent preventative maintenance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with long-term reliability. We invite you to experience the superior standards of our curated inventory with this exceptional offering.

Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, it represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a balance of quality and value. We invite you to experience the refined handling and enduring integrity of this premier offering.

Hi there! I’m so excited to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s in wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready to go and feels great on the road. It’s been well-loved and is just waiting for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. This high-revving 3.2L inline-six delivers linear power through individual throttle bodies, paired with a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. Notable maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. The factory-spec limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the suspension geometry remains tight with refreshed bushings and dampers. A driver-focused example that prioritizes mechanical integrity and analog feedback.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable transportation.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive condition, perfect for a driver who values both reliability and aesthetics. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, with only minor, age-appropriate imperfections that do not detract from its striking curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the upholstery remains supple with minimal wear, and every electronic feature—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust and dependable, benefiting from a history of regular preventative maintenance and timely fluid changes. The engine delivers smooth, consistent power, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires provide excellent grip with plenty of tread remaining. This is a complete, turn-key package for someone seeking a well-maintained vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

This unit has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring mechanical reliability and a refined aesthetic presence. I’ve taken wonderful care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I do! Let’s get you on the road!
